what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 stroke-only SVG icon showing a calendar outline with top binding marks and a check mark inside.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with no fill and currentColor stroke.
The calendar body is a rectangle from x=3 y=5 to width=18 height=16 with rx=1.
A single path draws the calendar header divider and two vertical binding marks.
A second path draws a check mark using three line segments.
standouts: Compact inline SVG made from one rect and two paths.
Rounded stroke caps and joins create a soft line icon style.
conventions: Uses common icon defaults: fill="none", stroke="currentColor", stroke-width="1.5", stroke-linecap="round", stroke-linejoin="round".
Uses a 24x24 coordinate system typical for UI icon sets.
Keeps all geometry inline without external references.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria metadata is included for standalone accessibility.
notes: This file is a simple calendar-with-check SVG icon intended for date confirmation or completion states.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by this SVG or by the consuming UI?
Is stroke-width="1.5" the intended weight for the surrounding icon set?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename's calendar-check purpose matches the visible calendar outline with an internal check mark.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a small, color-inheriting UI symbol for scheduled, completed, or confirmed calendar-related actions.
contribution: Provides calendar confirmation icon geometry as a currentColor, stroke-based SVG asset that a fused system would keep for date-completion or scheduling-confirmation affordances.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon depicting a calendar with header marks and a check mark inside.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing confirmed, completed, or checked calendar states in a UI icon set.
